channel.title: Ric 12 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 12 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Alley with three lamps (Ric 12)
item.description: Short description Alley with three lamps Notes: The name of the images is “Drei Lampen Gasse, Paris” (Three latern alley, Paris). One of only a few named prints currently known. Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 12
item.description: Short description: Alley with three lamps Notes: There seem to be no title on the lower left, but the image is cropped Other entries for this work
